channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Historic U.S. Route 66 Celebrates 100 Years, Drawing Travelers to Small Towns
item.description: As U.S. Route 66 celebrates its centennial, historic small towns along the iconic highway are seeing renewed interest from travelers. Stretching across eight states, Route 66 once served as a major ro...

item.title: Two People Injured in Multiple Shootings and Carjacking in Prince George’s County
item.description: On Friday afternoon, Prince George’s County police reported a series of shootings and a carjacking that left two people injured, one critically. The incidents caused significant concern in the communi...

item.title: Iran emphasises national resilience and regional cooperation amid nuclear talks
item.description: Iran's Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei, on Friday praised the country's persistent resistance as a source of national strength, asserting that it has prepared Tehran to face challenges from...

item.title: A Look Back at Ozzy Osbourne’s Marriage to Thelma Riley
item.description: Ozzy Osbourne was married to his first wife, Thelma Riley, from 1971 to 1982. Their relationship coincided with the rise of Black Sabbath and was heavily impacted by Ozzy's struggles with drug and alc...

item.title: Consumers File Lawsuit Against Amazon Over Non-Refund of Unlawful Trump Tariffs
item.description: On May 15, 2026, Amazon.com Inc. was sued in a proposed class action in a federal court in Seattle, as consumers seek refunds for costs imposed through higher prices resulting from tariffs introduced ...

item.title: Toronto Councillor Parthi Kandavel Under OPP Investigation for Allegations
item.description: Toronto City Councillor Parthi Kandavel of Scarborough-Southwest is currently under investigation by the Ontario Provincial Police (OPP) following complaints referred by the city's Integrity Commissio...

item.title: EFCC Takes Viscount Microfinance Bank MD to Court Over N19 Million and $30,000 Alleged Fraud
item.description: The Economic and Financial Crimes Commission (EFCC) don carry Blessing Gozi-Anyaokei, wey be managing director of Viscount Microfinance Bank, go court for Abuja over fraud matter wey involve N19 milli...

item.title: Baguio Sees Gradual Tourist Recovery, Local Businesses Remain Affected
item.description: Tourism in Baguio City has started to show signs of recovery over the past two weeks, according to Mayor Benjamin Magalong. Despite this gradual rebound, the city’s economy is still feeling the pressu...

item.title: Africa CDC mobilises to contain Ebola outbreak in eastern DRC
item.description: Communities in the eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) are grappling with a new Ebola virus disease outbreak in Ituri province. The Africa Centres for Disease Control and Prevention (Africa...

item.title: Teenager sentenced for death of grandmother in Sunderland motorbike crash
item.description: An 18-year-old, Billy Stokoe, has been sentenced to nearly seven years in youth detention for causing the death of 86-year-old Gloria Stephenson in Sunderland. The crash occurred in May 2025 when Stok...

item.title: Desmond Elliot Vows to Continue Political Career Amidst Party Tensions
item.description: Desmond Elliot, the Lagos lawmaker and Nollywood actor, don talk why e wan run for fourth term to represent Surulere Constituency 1 for Lagos State House of Assembly. During campaign wey happen on Fri...

item.title: Alice Bruno: Celebrated Model of 1950s High Fashion
item.description: Alice Bruno was one of the most iconic fashion models of the 1950s, admired for her elegance, poise, and versatility. Renowned for her sharp cheekbones, expressive eyes, and captivating presence in fr...

item.title: Tensions Between DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin and Senator Rand Paul Continue
item.description: Department of Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin, appointed by former President Donald Trump, is reportedly experiencing ongoing tension with Senator Rand Paul (R-KY), who chairs the Senate ...

item.title: President Ramaphosa dismisses Social Development Minister Sisisi Tolashe amid corruption allegations
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa has dismissed Social Development Minister Sisisi Tolashe following a series of serious allegations. Tolashe faced accusations of corruption, misconduct, and misuse of public ...

item.title: DSE Week 7 2026 Reports Strong Rally in Banking and Investment Stocks with TZS 58.61 Billion Turnover
item.description: During Week 7 of 2026, the Dar es Salaam Stock Exchange (DSE) experienced a significant surge in trading activity, mainly driven by banking and investment stocks. Equity turnover jumped to TZS 58.61 b...

item.title: Senator Bato dela Rosa placed under immigration monitoring following ICC warrant
item.description: MANILA, Philippines – Senator Ronald 'Bato' dela Rosa has been placed under an Immigration Lookout Bulletin Order (ILBO) by the Bureau of Immigration, as announced by the Department of Justice (DOJ) o...

item.title: Understanding the Word 'Kiping': May 16, 2026 Feature
item.description: ABS-CBN continues its commitment to educating and engaging its audience with the 'Word of the Day' feature. On May 16, 2026, the highlighted word is 'kiping,' a term that holds cultural significance i...

item.title: Examining Alberta's Separatist Movement and Its Political Context
item.description: Discussions about Alberta's potential separation from Canada are resurfacing, as proponents of independence claim to have successfully pushed a petition to bring the question to voters. However, the m...

item.title: Actor Vijay expresses concern over rising fuel prices affecting common people
item.description: The popular actor Vijay has publicly expressed his concern over the recent hike in fuel prices, stating that the increase will directly impact the poor and the middle-class citizens of India. He criti...

item.title: Springbok Squad Decisions Influenced by Injuries and URC Playoff Outcomes
item.description: Springbok coach Rassie Erasmus is keeping a keen eye on the final round of the United Rugby Championship (URC), where the Bulls, Lions, and Stormers are vying for strong positions heading into the pla...
